_description: Cultural sensitivity rules for Thai indigenous textile patterns. Defines taboo patterns, sacred motifs requiring community approval, and usage guidelines.
_warning: These rules are based on academic research and should be validated with community representatives before commercial use.

taboo_patterns._description: Patterns that should never be used for specific communities

spiral_clockwise.name: Clockwise Spiral
spiral_clockwise.description: Clockwise spiral patterns are considered inauspicious in several communities, representing the wrong direction of spiritual energy
spiral_clockwise.reason: Represents incorrect spiritual direction; associated with death rituals

diagonal_cross.name: Diagonal Cross (X)
diagonal_cross.description: X-shaped cross patterns are restricted in some communities
diagonal_cross.reason: Associated with negative spiritual symbols in some traditions

random_scatter.name: Random Scatter
random_scatter.description: Completely random, non-patterned layouts are culturally inappropriate
random_scatter.reason: Textiles must have intentional pattern; randomness implies lack of cultural respect

solid_black.name: Solid Black Field
solid_black.reason: Solid black is reserved for specific ceremonial/mourning contexts

zigzag.name: Zigzag Pattern
zigzag.description: Zigzag patterns are restricted for some communities
zigzag.reason: Not part of traditional visual vocabulary for these groups

sacred_motifs._description: Motifs that require community approval before use. These are culturally significant and may only be used with permission.

spirit_band.name: Spirit Band
spirit_band.description: Woven band representing the spirit pathway
spirit_band.context: Used in funeral and ancestor veneration ceremonies

clan_stripe.name: Clan Stripe
clan_stripe.description: Horizontal stripe band indicating clan membership
clan_stripe.restriction: Only members of specific clans may use

snail_path.name: Snail Path
snail_path.description: Spiral representing the Hmong migration journey

flower_carpet.name: Flower Carpet
flower_carpet.description: Intricate floral pattern on ceremonial cloth

spirit_gate.name: Spirit Gate
spirit_gate.description: Village gate pattern marking spiritual boundary

silver_circle.name: Silver Circle
silver_circle.description: Circular motif representing silver coins on headdress

naga_serpent.name: Naga Serpent
naga_serpent.description: Naga serpent, guardian of water and Buddhism

mount_meru.name: Mount Meru
mount_meru.description: Cosmic mountain at center of Buddhist universe

lai_kham.name: Lai Kham
lai_kham.description: Golden pattern, most prized Thai Lue motif

spirit_bridge.name: Spirit Bridge
spirit_bridge.description: Bridge between the living and spirit worlds

kingdom_mark.name: Kingdom Mark
kingdom_mark.description: Mark of the historical Tai Dam kingdom

commercial_use.warning: Commercial use of indigenous textile patterns requires explicit community consent and benefit-sharing agreements
commercial_use.recommendation: Always consult with community representatives before commercializing any pattern
commercial_use.legal_framework: Consider Thailand's Protection and Promotion of the Thai Traditional Wisdom Act

attribution.requirement: All generated patterns must include community attribution
attribution.format: Pattern must credit: community name, motif names used, and cultural context

education.encouraged: Educational and cultural preservation use is encouraged with proper attribution

sacred_context.warning: Sacred motifs should not be used in contexts that could be considered disrespectful (e.g., footwear, bathroom items)
sacred_context.recommendation: Avoid placing sacred motifs on items that touch the ground or feet

steps.name: Identify
steps.description: Identify which motifs and patterns are sacred or restricted

steps.name: Consult
steps.description: Consult community representatives or cultural organizations

steps.name: Request
steps.description: Submit formal request for usage permission

steps.name: Agree
steps.description: Negotiate terms of use, benefit sharing, and attribution

steps.name: Document
steps.description: Document approval in writing with community representative

steps.name: Implement
steps.description: Implement pattern with all agreed conditions met
